---
title: "Executive Summary"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**The one-paragraph version of this project**, written for someone who will read
this page and nothing else. Plain language, no jargon, no acronyms unexplained.
:::

<!--
prompt:
  - In one sentence, what does this project do?
  - Who is it for, and what problem does it solve for them?
  - What's the headline finding or outcome a reader should walk away with?
-->
